utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , but what if it is not ? What if there is a reason why we can not have a baby ?

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , Chandler , look . You and Monica are meant to have children . I am sure it is gonna be just fine .

emotion_cause.span: 2_You and Monica are meant to have children . I am sure it is gonna be just fine .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can not believe I did not even think of that .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I did not even think of that .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I guess I was just so worried about having to ... come here and do ... that ...

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: What , you can do it in the parking lot of a Taco Bell , but you can not do it at a doctor office ?
